nasb.text: deeds of coveting and wickedness, as well as deceit, sensuality, envy, slander, pride and foolishness.

esv.text: coveting, wickedness, deceit, sensuality, envy, slander, pride, foolishness.

cnv.text: 姦淫、貪心、邪惡、詭詐、放蕩、嫉妒、毀謗、驕傲、愚妄；

ccb.text: 通奸、贪婪、邪恶、诡诈、放荡、嫉妒、毁谤、骄傲、狂妄。

csbs.text: 通奸、贪心、恶意、欺诈、好色、嫉妒、毁谤、骄傲、愚妄，
